title: cynoglossum luristanicum
intro: Cynoglossum luristanicum, also known as Iranian Hound's Tongue, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Iran and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the relief of digestive problems, reduction of fever, and improvement of respiratory issues. Cynoglossum luristanicum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable component in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
